name: Applied Digital Corp.
summary: Overview Our Business We are a United States ("U.S.") designer, developer, and operator of next-generation data center infrastructure across North America. We provide data center infrastructure solutions to the rapidly growing industries of high-performance computing ("HPC") and artificial intelligence ("AI"). We operate in two distinct business segments, blockchain data center hosting (the "Data Center Hosting Business") and HPC data center hosting (the "HPC Hosting Business"), as further discu...
